prerequisites: A Convex account with a deployed project (sign in at the Convex dashboard).
The deployment URL for the target deployment, copied from the deployment Settings page on the Convex dashboard (for example https://acoustic-panther-728.convex.cloud).
A Convex Deploy key generated for that deployment, which grants full read and write access to the deployment's data and is used as the access key.

authMethods.name: Deploy key (access key)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Convex Deploy key supplied as the access_key field. The connector sends it to the deployment's HTTP API in the Authorization header using the form 'Convex <access_key>', which authorizes the streaming export/import endpoints with full read and write access to the deployment's data. Generate the Deploy key from the deployment Settings page on the Convex dashboard.

setupSteps.title: Open the deployment settings
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Convex dashboard and open the Settings (General) page for the deployment you want to sync. This page shows the deployment URL and the controls to generate, view, and delete deploy keys.

setupSteps.title: Copy the deployment URL
setupSteps.body: Copy the deployment URL shown on the Settings page and provide it as the deployment_url config field (for example https://acoustic-panther-728.convex.cloud). The HTTP API endpoints are served under this base URL.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Deploy key
setupSteps.body: On the same Settings page, generate a Deploy key for the deployment. This key acts as the access key and grants full read and write access to the deployment's data for the HTTP streaming export API.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access key
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated Deploy key as the access_key secret field. The connector authenticates to the deployment's HTTP API by sending this value in the Authorization header as 'Convex <access_key>'.
